nodes.label: Bridge: the open wound (depth decay past ~layer 5) becomes Phase 5; noise-hardening becomes Phase 6
nodes.description: The capability map left one wound open: past ~layer 5 the representation decays (local-objective drift, not capacity/width). This caps the depth the substrate can spend and drags the deployed all-tap readout. Phase 5 names the decay precisely (a direction failure), earns depth back with a sharper objective, reads it cheaply with a fixed short stack. Noise-hardening (train-with-noise) becomes Phase 6, closing Stage 1. Maintenance-loop optimization becomes Stage 2 (Phases 7-10).

hyperedges.description: P4.3's discovery that OURS decays past ~layer 5 (not fixed by width) is the single open wound the whole capability map flags, and it directly becomes the scope of Phase 5 (SCFF close-out: name the decay, earn depth back with a sharper objective, read it cheaply).
